channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Unified Authentication for OAuth2 and API Keys via Edge Token Normalization
item.description: Recently, I was building a developer-facing API and ran into a problem I couldn’t find a clean answer to anywhere. I needed to support long-running, fully automated, user-delegated access with no...

item.title: I Built a Tool That Lets You Contribute to Open Source in Any Language
item.description: I was browsing a really interesting React issue on GitHub. Somebody had found a genuinly clever edge case with Suspense boundaries. The discussion was detailed, technical, and... entirely in...

item.title: MCP Development with Amazon Lambda and Gemini CLI
item.description: Leveraging Gemini CLI and the underlying Gemini LLM to build Model Context Protocol (MCP) AI applications with Python from a local development environment deployed to the Lambda service on AWS....

item.title: Ansible for DevOps: Automate Server Configuration in 30 Minutes (Not 30 Days)
item.description: You have 15 servers. Each one needs the same packages, the same users, the same firewall rules, the same monitoring agent, and the same application configuration. You can SSH into each one and run...

item.title: MCP Development with Gemini CLI and Amazon Fargate
item.description: Leveraging Gemini CLI and the underlying Gemini LLM to build Model Context Protocol (MCP) AI applications with Python from a local development environment deployed to the Fargate serverless...

item.title: Diagramify - automatic diagram creation for Notion
item.description: I'm often writing descriptions and ideas on projects in Notion. And I thought: it'd be nice to have such system descriptions summarized in a diagram of proper kind, be it a flow diagram, decision...

item.title: Apple’s $549 AirPods Max 2 add better ANC and live translation
item.description: Apple has just announced the AirPods Max 2 with better noise cancellation and sound quality. The second generation of Apple's over-ear headphones starts at $549 and comes equipped with an H2 chip,...

item.title: How I Built Niobe: An AI Waitress with Gemini Live and Google Cloud
item.description: Disclaimer: I created this blog post for the purposes of entering the Gemini Live Agent Challenge hackathon. When sharing on social media, use the hashtag #GeminiLiveAgentChallenge. What is Niobe?...

item.title: Meme Monday
item.description: Meme Monday! Today's cover image comes from the last thread. DEV is an inclusive space! Humor in poor taste will be downvoted by mods.

item.title: Stop Overpaying for VectorDBs: Architecting Serverless RAG on AWS
item.description: Building a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) prototype takes a weekend. Taking that prototype to production without burning through your infrastructure budget is a completely different...

item.title: Modernización sin fricción: AWS Transform en acción (VMware EC2 nativo). Parte 2: Hands-on
item.description: 🧠Introducción En la Parte 1 expliqué por qué AWS Transform para VMware está cambiando la forma en que planificamos migraciones a escala: discovery, traducción de red y wave planning asistidos por...

item.title: Nurturing agentic AI beyond the toddler stage
item.description: Parents of young children face a lot of fears about developmental milestones, from infancy through adulthood. The number of months it takes a baby to learn to talk or walk is often used as a...

item.title: This is not a fly uploaded to a computer
item.description: Last week, a few posts about a so-called virtual "embodied fly" tore through X, boosted by AI hype accounts and excited commenters who didn't seem to understand what it was they were excited...

item.title: The Download: glass chips and “AI-free” logos
item.description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Future AI chips could be built on glass Human-made glass...

item.title: The classic Apple Macintosh mouse inspired Spigen’s retro AirPods case
item.description: If you've already given your iPhone 17 Pro and Pro Max a retro '80s facelift with Spigen's Macintosh 128K and Apple Lisa-inspired Classic LS cases, you might as well make your wireless earbuds...

item.title: Why Security Validation Is Becoming Agentic
item.description: If you run security at any reasonably complex organization, your validation stack probably looks something like this: a BAS tool in one corner. A pentest engagement, or maybe an automated...

item.title: ClickFix Campaigns Spread MacSync macOS Infostealer via Fake AI Tool Installers
item.description: Three different ClickFix campaigns have been found to act as a delivery vector for the deployment of a macOS information stealer called MacSync. "Unlike traditional exploit-based attacks, this...

item.title: OpenAI’s adult mode will reportedly be smutty, not pornographic
item.description: OpenAI's delayed "adult mode" for ChatGPT is expected to support saucy text conversations at launch, but not the chatbot's ability to generate images, voice, or video. Speaking to The Wall Street...

item.title: Securing digital assets against future threats
My fitness tracker is a secret weapon against my chronic illness
item.description: One of the first major crashes I experienced as a chronically ill person happened on an unusually sunny January day in New York City. It was 2023, and I was riding my bike with a friend, flying...

item.title: Possible New Result in Quantum Factorization
item.description: I’m skeptical about—and not qualified to review—this new result in factorization with a quantum computer, but if it’s true it’s a theoretical improvement in the speed of factoring large numbers...

item.title: DRILLAPP Backdoor Targets Ukraine, Abuses Microsoft Edge Debugging for Stealth Espionage
item.description: Ukrainian entities have emerged as the target of a new campaign likely orchestrated by threat actors linked to Russia, according to a report from S2 Grupo's LAB52 threat intelligence team. The...

item.title: Models Are Applying to Be the Face of AI Scams
item.description: Dozens of Telegram channels reviewed by WIRED include job listings for “AI face models.” The (mostly) women who land these gigs are likely being used to dupe victims out of their money.

item.title: Android 17 Blocks Non-Accessibility Apps from Accessibility API to Prevent Malware Abuse
item.description: Google is testing a new security feature as part of Android Advanced Protection Mode (AAPM) that prevents certain kinds of apps from using the accessibility services API. The change, incorporated...

item.title: Google, Accel India accelerator chooses 5 startups and none are ‘AI wrappers’
item.description: Google and Accel say about 70% of AI startup pitches tied to India were "wrappers" as they reviewed more than 4,000 applications for their Atoms cohort.

item.title: ByteDance reportedly pauses global launch of its Seedance 2.0 video generator
item.description: The company is reportedly delaying the launch as its engineers and lawyers work to avert further legal issues.

item.title: Aether OS is a computer in a browser built for the AT Protocol
item.description: Aether OS puts a full-fledged desktop in your browser that ties directly into the AT Protocol. That means it connects to your Bluesky account and other public records. It offers a pretty full...

item.title: Lawyer behind AI psychosis cases warns of mass casualty risks
item.description: AI chatbots have been linked to suicides for years. Now one lawyer says they are showing up in mass casualty cases too, and the technology is moving faster than the safeguards.

item.title: Sotomayor’s Wabi Sabi is the funnest record of 2026
item.description: Shout out to subscriber N_Gorski for today's pick. They popped into the comments on last week's recommendation to ask what I thought of the new Sotomayor record. Well, I hadn't actually heard it...

item.title: Wiz investor unpacks Google’s $32B acquisition
item.description: Shardul Shah of Index Ventures walks us through Google's biggest acquisition ever.
